patch.value: CONTEXT: Claude Code/Codex plugins enable richer integration than a bare MCP server. DECISION: pm is the single source of truth for all work-item state (claims/history/files/tests/comments/plans); plugin UIs (session-start context injection, slash commands) read from pm and keep NO independent state; the Codex plugin follows the same pattern. CONSEQUENCES: all history is git-reviewable; agents across environments share one data model with no sync conflicts; plugin capability inventories must be kept in sync with the CLI surface; full in-editor TUI remains future work. EVIDENCE: plugins/pm-claude, docs/CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md; memory project_plugin_hybrid_tui; items pm-0d0q/pm-d97r.
ADR: Plugin hybrid model: pm is the git-native store; the editor/agent panel is a live session view
Plugin hybrid model: pm is the git-native store; the editor/agent panel is a live session view
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
Accepted ADR recorded in living map
The ADR captures a durable architecture or operating decision with context, consequences, and evidence for future agents.

The closed Decision 'ADR: Plugin hybrid model: pm is the git-native store; the editor/agent panel is a live session view' is recorded under the ADR living log and preserved as durable project context.
